TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Potipot_siyakay_no_Siwkolan_’Amis, title = Potipot_siyakay_no_Siwkolan_’Amis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Potipot_siyakay_no_Siwkolan_’Amis} }

S.FORM: Potipot siyakay no Siwkolan 'Amis Onini a tilid ato "O lalosidan no serangawan no Siwkolan a 'Amis" o malecaday to nai cong-yin-yin min-co-so koni likakawa koni tosa a tilid, nahani, o cecayay ko litapangan, saka o cecayay ko lowad misanga toni tosa a tilid, nika o citodongay cowa kahecad, o laloma' to 'aloman ko citodongay cowa kahecad. Onini a tilid citodongay i, ira ci 劉斌雄 kapot nira i ira ca 丘其謙 ato 石磊 ato 陳清清 hakasi. 1965 a miheca o cong-yin-yin min-co-so ko patahekalay, maparayray to sakafalo a patosokan a tilid. Tosa miheca ko pirakat mikilim piciyosa toni a tilid, itini i niyaro' no Fata'an ko patosokan, nika macowak talaroma no Siwkolan a 'etal no niyaro' no 'Amis. O paro nona tilid ira ko: sakacecay a liyad, o likisi ato salawacan no pala; sakatosa a liyad, kalaklak no niyaro'; sakatolo a liyad, laloma'an ato tamdaw; sakasepat a liyad, o kasangasaw; sakalima a liyad, pangangan no laloma'an ato pinangan no laloma'an; sakaenem a liyad, saki'orip apinangan; sakapito a liyad, o sapikowan to niyaro'; sakafalo a liyad, likakawa no sakidafong; sakasiwa a liyad, o rikec; sakamoetep a liyad o sapifolaw. O roma 'adihay ko painian pakafana' to potipot no pinangan ato litapangan no sapisilsil to kinaira nitilidan ato malocoka, mato nicokaan to no rayray no ngangasawan no Fata'an a niyaro', no pakainaay a lilengawan no Fata'an, no Tafalong to pilalang no mangangatay ko kararamod, pahapinang to 'aro no taheka, o kasateked no kapot no Fata'an ato pasinto, sepatay a niyaro' no siwkolan to pangangan a kasasotiri', o misilsilan to pinganganan no salawinawina, o rayray no liteng ni cokaan, no itiraay niyaro' a kasakapot, no Kiwit kasaselal a ngangan, o rayray sapikowan no Fata'an to pala, o 'etal no pifotingan ato sapikowan no rayray lima ko safaw to nicokaan, sepat polo' ira ko cecay tatiri'en. Toni patalahekalan a ngangan no liyad ato nisadakan nicokaan malotatiri'an, so'elin to maemin maparo ko potipot no siyakay kasamanmaan a manengneng itini tona tilid, tadamahapinang ko serangawan ato likakawa no 'Amis. Pi'arawan to lakaw 陳文德,1989, "68:105-144.
S.PHON: po~utipo~ut sijakaj no~u siwko~uɾan ʡamis o~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u "o~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u səraŋawan no~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis" o~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u nai ʦo~uŋ-jin-jin min-ʦo~u-so~u ko~uni ɾikakawa ko~uni to~usa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, naħani, o~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ɾitapaŋan, saka o~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ misaŋa to~uni to~usa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, nika o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ to~u ʡaɾo~uman ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ. o~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i, ira ʦi *** kapo~ut nira i ira ʦa *** ato~u ** ato~u *** ħakasi. **** a miħəʦa o~u ʦo~uŋ-jin-jin min-ʦo~u-so~u ko~u pataħəkaɾaj, maparajraj to~u sakafaɾo~u a pato~uso~ukan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. to~usa miħəʦa ko~u pirakat mikiɾim piʦijo~usa to~uni a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, itini i nijaro~uʡ no~u fataʡan ko~u pato~uso~ukan, nika maʦo~uwak taɾaro~uma no~u siwko~uɾan a ʡətaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis. o~u paro~u no~una tiɾiɬ~ɮ ira ko~u: sakaʦəʦaj a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u ɾikisi ato~u saɾawaʦan no~u paɾa; sakato~usa a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, kaɾakɾak no~u nijaro~uʡ; sakato~uɾo~u a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw; sakasəpat a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u kasaŋasaw; sakaɾima a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, paŋaŋan no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u pinaŋan no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan; sakaənəm a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, sakiʡo~urip apinaŋan; sakapito~u a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapiko~uwan to~u nijaro~uʡ; sakafaɾo~u a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, ɾikakawa no~u sakiɬ~ɮafo~uŋ; sakasiwa a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u rikəʦ; sakamo~uətəp a ɾijaɬ~ɮ o~u sapifo~uɾaw. o~u ro~uma ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u painian pakafanaʡ to~u po~utipo~ut no~u pinaŋan ato~u ɾitapaŋan no~u sapisiɾsiɾ to~u kinaira nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ato~u maɾo~uʦo~uka, mato~u niʦo~ukaan to~u no~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋasawan no~u fataʡan a nijaro~uʡ, no~u pakainaaj a ɾiɾəŋawan no~u fataʡan, no~u tafaɾo~uŋ to~u piɾaɾaŋ no~u maŋaŋataj ko~u kararamo~uɬ~ɮ, paħapinaŋ to~u ʡaro~u no~u taħəka, o~u kasatəkəɬ~ɮ no~u kapo~ut no~u fataʡan ato~u pasinto~u, səpataj a nijaro~uʡ no~u siwko~uɾan to~u paŋaŋan a kasaso~utiriʡ, o~u misiɾsiɾan to~u piŋaŋanan no~u saɾawinawina, o~u rajraj no~u ɾitəŋ ni ʦo~ukaan, no~u itiraaj nijaro~uʡ a kasakapo~ut, no~u kiwit kasasəɾaɾ a ŋaŋan, o~u rajraj sapiko~uwan no~u fataʡan to~u paɾa, o~u ʡətaɾ no~u pifo~utiŋan ato~u sapiko~uwan no~u rajraj ɾima ko~u safaw to~u niʦo~ukaan, səpat po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj tatiriʡən. to~uni pataɾaħəkaɾan a ŋaŋan no~u ɾijaɬ~ɮ ato~u nisaɬ~ɮakan niʦo~ukaan maɾo~utatiriʡan, so~uʡəɾin to~u maəmin maparo~u ko~u po~utipo~ut no~u sijakaj kasamanmaan a manəŋnəŋ itini to~una tiɾiɬ~ɮ, taɬ~ɮamaħapinaŋ ko~u səraŋawan ato~u ɾikakawa no~u ʡamis. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ***,****, "**:***-***.
S.FORM: Potipot siyakay no Siwkolan 'Amis Onini a tilid ato "O lalosidan no serangawan no Siwkolan a 'Amis" o malecaday to nai cong-yin-yin min-co-so koni likakawa koni tosa a tilid, nahani, o cecayay ko litapangan, saka o cecayay ko lowad misanga toni tosa a tilid, nika o citodongay cowa kahecad, o laloma' to 'aloman ko citodongay cowa kahecad. Onini a tilid citodongay i, ira ci 劉斌雄 kapot nira i ira ca 丘其謙 ato 石磊 ato 陳清清 hakasi. 1965 a miheca o cong-yin-yin min-co-so ko patahekalay, maparayray to sakafalo a patosokan a tilid. Tosa miheca ko pirakat mikilim piciyosa toni a tilid, itini i niyaro' no Fata'an ko patosokan, nika macowak talaroma no Siwkolan a 'etal no niyaro' no 'Amis. O paro nona tilid ira ko: sakacecay a liyad, o likisi ato salawacan no pala; sakatosa a liyad, kalaklak no niyaro'; sakatolo a liyad, laloma'an ato tamdaw; sakasepat a liyad, o kasangasaw; sakalima a liyad, pangangan no laloma'an ato pinangan no laloma'an; sakaenem a liyad, saki'orip apinangan; sakapito a liyad, o sapikowan to niyaro'; sakafalo a liyad, likakawa no sakidafong; sakasiwa a liyad, o rikec; sakamoetep a liyad o sapifolaw. O roma 'adihay ko painian pakafana' to potipot no pinangan ato litapangan no sapisilsil to kinaira nitilidan ato malocoka, mato nicokaan to no rayray no ngangasawan no Fata'an a niyaro', no pakainaay a lilengawan no Fata'an, no Tafalong to pilalang no mangangatay ko kararamod, pahapinang to 'aro no taheka, o kasateked no kapot no Fata'an ato pasinto, sepatay a niyaro' no siwkolan to pangangan a kasasotiri', o misilsilan to pinganganan no salawinawina, o rayray no liteng ni cokaan, no itiraay niyaro' a kasakapot, no Kiwit kasaselal a ngangan, o rayray sapikowan no Fata'an to pala, o 'etal no pifotingan ato sapikowan no rayray lima ko safaw to nicokaan, sepat polo' ira ko cecay tatiri'en. Toni patalahekalan a ngangan no liyad ato nisadakan nicokaan malotatiri'an, so'elin to maemin maparo ko potipot no siyakay kasamanmaan a manengneng itini tona tilid, tadamahapinang ko serangawan ato likakawa no 'Amis. Pi'arawan to lakaw 陳文德,1989, "68:105-144.
S.PHON: po~utipo~ut sijakaj no~u siwko~uɾan ʡamis o~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u "o~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u səraŋawan no~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis" o~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u nai ʦo~uŋ-jin-jin min-ʦo~u-so~u ko~uni ɾikakawa ko~uni to~usa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, naħani, o~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ɾitapaŋan, saka o~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ misaŋa to~uni to~usa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, nika o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ to~u ʡaɾo~uman ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ. o~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i, ira ʦi *** kapo~ut nira i ira ʦa *** ato~u ** ato~u *** ħakasi. **** a miħəʦa o~u ʦo~uŋ-jin-jin min-ʦo~u-so~u ko~u pataħəkaɾaj, maparajraj to~u sakafaɾo~u a pato~uso~ukan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. to~usa miħəʦa ko~u pirakat mikiɾim piʦijo~usa to~uni a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, itini i nijaro~uʡ no~u fataʡan ko~u pato~uso~ukan, nika maʦo~uwak taɾaro~uma no~u siwko~uɾan a ʡətaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis. o~u paro~u no~una tiɾiɬ~ɮ ira ko~u: sakaʦəʦaj a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u ɾikisi ato~u saɾawaʦan no~u paɾa; sakato~usa a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, kaɾakɾak no~u nijaro~uʡ; sakato~uɾo~u a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw; sakasəpat a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u kasaŋasaw; sakaɾima a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, paŋaŋan no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u pinaŋan no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan; sakaənəm a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, sakiʡo~urip apinaŋan; sakapito~u a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapiko~uwan to~u nijaro~uʡ; sakafaɾo~u a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, ɾikakawa no~u sakiɬ~ɮafo~uŋ; sakasiwa a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, o~u rikəʦ; sakamo~uətəp a ɾijaɬ~ɮ o~u sapifo~uɾaw. o~u ro~uma ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u painian pakafanaʡ to~u po~utipo~ut no~u pinaŋan ato~u ɾitapaŋan no~u sapisiɾsiɾ to~u kinaira nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ato~u maɾo~uʦo~uka, mato~u niʦo~ukaan to~u no~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋasawan no~u fataʡan a nijaro~uʡ, no~u pakainaaj a ɾiɾəŋawan no~u fataʡan, no~u tafaɾo~uŋ to~u piɾaɾaŋ no~u maŋaŋataj ko~u kararamo~uɬ~ɮ, paħapinaŋ to~u ʡaro~u no~u taħəka, o~u kasatəkəɬ~ɮ no~u kapo~ut no~u fataʡan ato~u pasinto~u, səpataj a nijaro~uʡ no~u siwko~uɾan to~u paŋaŋan a kasaso~utiriʡ, o~u misiɾsiɾan to~u piŋaŋanan no~u saɾawinawina, o~u rajraj no~u ɾitəŋ ni ʦo~ukaan, no~u itiraaj nijaro~uʡ a kasakapo~ut, no~u kiwit kasasəɾaɾ a ŋaŋan, o~u rajraj sapiko~uwan no~u fataʡan to~u paɾa, o~u ʡətaɾ no~u pifo~utiŋan ato~u sapiko~uwan no~u rajraj ɾima ko~u safaw to~u niʦo~ukaan, səpat po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj tatiriʡən. to~uni pataɾaħəkaɾan a ŋaŋan no~u ɾijaɬ~ɮ ato~u nisaɬ~ɮakan niʦo~ukaan maɾo~utatiriʡan, so~uʡəɾin to~u maəmin maparo~u ko~u po~utipo~ut no~u sijakaj kasamanmaan a manəŋnəŋ itini to~una tiɾiɬ~ɮ, taɬ~ɮamaħapinaŋ ko~u səraŋawan ato~u ɾikakawa no~u ʡamis. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ***,****, "**:***-***.
